title: Percentages
description: Master the fundamental concept of percentages, essential for almost all other aptitude topics.

title: Profit & Loss
description: Learn to calculate cost price, selling price, markups, and discounts with advanced shortcuts.

title: Time & Work
description: Understand the concepts of efficiency, combined work, and pipes and cisterns.

title: Time, Speed & Distance
description: Solve problems involving relative speed, trains, and boats & streams.

title: Ratio & Proportion
description: Learn to divide quantities and work with mixtures and alligations.

title: Number System
description: Deep dive into divisibility rules, remainders, factors, and unit digits.

title: Algebra
description: Brush up on linear equations, quadratic equations, and inequalities.

title: Averages
description: Learn shortcut methods for finding averages, mixtures, and replacements.

title: Simple & Compound Interest
description: Understand interest compounding, effective rates, and installment calculations.

title: Data Interpretation
description: Analyze and interpret data from pie charts, bar graphs, and line charts.

title: Probability
description: Understand concepts of random events, sample spaces, and conditional probability.

title: Permutations & Combinations
description: Master counting principles, arrangements, and selection problems.
